relative.inviteDesc: Remotely monitor your patient's cognitive health through a secure invitation from a doctor or caregiver.

hero.title: Digital Tracking Platform for Chronic Diseases
hero.subtitle: Home education, symptom tracking, and physician panel for migraine, epilepsy, Parkinson's, and dementia patients.

trust.sectionDesc: Your health data is protected with the highest security standards
trust.encryptionDesc: All your data is encrypted end-to-end and stored on secure servers.
trust.kvkkDesc: Your personal data is protected under KVKK Law No. 6698. Never shared without your explicit consent.
trust.auditDesc: Every access to your health data is logged and auditable.
trust.doctorsDesc: Our content is reviewed by neurologists working at university hospitals in Turkey.

whoIsItFor.sectionDesc: Tailored experiences for every user group
whoIsItFor.patientsDesc: Log your symptoms, discover triggers, track medications. Share your data with your doctor.
whoIsItFor.patientsItems: Symptom diary, medication reminders, AI assistant, cognitive exercises
whoIsItFor.caregiversDesc: Remotely monitor your loved ones' cognitive health. View daily assessments and caregiver notes.
whoIsItFor.caregiversItems: Remote monitoring, caregiver notes, daily reports, alert notifications
whoIsItFor.doctorsDesc: Track your patients' symptom data in real-time. Receive critical alerts instantly, add clinical notes.
whoIsItFor.doctorsItems: Patient list, alert system, clinical notes, statistics panel

features.sectionDesc: All the tools you need to manage your neurological health in one platform
features.trackingDesc: Easily log your daily symptoms. Visualize your triggers within 3 months and discover patterns.
features.educationDesc: Disease-specific educational content, 15+ cognitive exercises and personalized task plans.
features.doctorDesc: Your doctor monitors your progress in real-time, receives critical alerts and guides you.
features.remindersDesc: Never miss medication and task reminders, cognitive exercise times and follow-up appointments.

modules.sectionDesc: Tracking and analysis tools specially designed for each neurological condition
modules.migraineDesc: Attack diary, trigger analysis, weather correlation and intensity charts
modules.epilepsyDesc: Seizure recording, trigger analysis, medication adherence tracking and monthly seizure charts
modules.dementiaDesc: 15+ cognitive exercises, daily assessment, caregiver notes and screening tests
modules.sleepDesc: Sleep disorders, sleep hygiene, diagnostic methods and disease-related sleep guides
modules.msDesc: MS definition, diagnostic criteria, MRI findings, biomarkers, treatment and new treatment options

story.name: Ayse, 32
story.quote: I discovered my triggers in 3 months. Now I can predict my attacks in advance.
story.step1desc: She registered for the Migraine module and entered her first attack record.
story.step2desc: She logged her attacks, triggers and medications for 3 months.
story.step3desc: She discovered that stress and sleep irregularity were the main triggers. Attack frequency decreased by 40%.

steps.sectionDesc: Getting started with Norosera is easy
steps.step1desc: Create an account with your email address.
steps.step2desc: Select from migraine, epilepsy or dementia modules.
steps.step3desc: Log your symptoms, monitor trends and share with your doctor.

board.sectionDesc: Our content and algorithms are reviewed by expert physicians in their fields
board.member1desc: 20 years of experience in migraine and headache
board.member2desc: Expert in epilepsy and EEG evaluation
board.member3desc: Expert in dementia and cognitive rehabilitation

testimonials.sectionDesc: Thousands of users and hundreds of physicians choose Norosera
testimonials.t1quote: I've been tracking my migraine attacks for 3 months. Discovering my triggers changed my life.
testimonials.t2quote: I can track my patients' attack data in real-time. I optimize my treatment plans accordingly.
testimonials.t3quote: I can remotely monitor my mother's cognitive exercises. A great convenience as a caregiver.
testimonials.t4quote: Thanks to medication reminders and seizure diary, I've become much more adherent to my treatment.

preview.sectionDesc: Take a look at the platform's key features before signing up
preview.screen1desc: Easily log your daily symptoms, track trends with charts and discover your triggers.
preview.screen1features: Attack diary, intensity charts, trigger analysis
preview.screen2desc: Your doctor tracks your progress with detailed reports and receives critical alerts instantly.
preview.screen2features: Patient list, alert system, clinical notes
preview.screen3desc: Protect and improve your brain health with 15+ interactive cognitive exercises.
preview.screen3features: Word games, memory tests, attention exercises

blog.cat3desc: Cognitive exercises, early diagnosis signs and caregiver guide
